subject: docs(claude): sync CLAUDE.md with upstream glow-props shared standards
body:
Merge changes from the external glow-props CLAUDE.md while preserving
project-specific sections (Project Status, Architecture, Key State
Structures, project-specific AI Notes).

Changes merged:
- Add Triggers section (review, audit, docs, mobile, clean, perf, security, debug, improve)
- Add "Download as PDF" suggested implementation pattern
- Add "Claude Code mobile/web — accessing sibling repos" AI note
- Add prohibition against interactive input prompts
- Update build tools note with Vite fallback info
- Remove Expo/React Native adaptation note from Debug System (moved upstream)

Tags: documentation, sync, claude-md

Risk: low
